'''dhasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabilonians|scabilonians]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabilonians|scabilonians]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsedeth|dhæsedeth]] || [[word:dhæsedej|dhæsedej]] || [[word:dhæsedesh|dhæsedesh]] || [[word:dhæsede|dhæsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasosodoth|dhasosodoth]] || [[word:dhasosodoj|dhasosodoj]] || [[word:dhasosodosh|dhasosodosh]] || [[word:dhasosodo|dhasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasodoth|dhasodoth]] || [[word:dhasodoj|dhasodoj]] || [[word:dhasodosh|dhasodosh]] || [[word:dhasodo|dhasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasofdoth|dhasofdoth]] || [[word:dhasofdoj|dhasofdoj]] || [[word:dhasofdosh|dhasofdosh]] || [[word:dhasofdof|dhasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasodotho|dhasodotho]] || [[word:dhasodojo|dhasodojo]] || [[word:dhasodosho|dhasodosho]] || [[word:dhasodoko|dhasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasodoth|dhasodoth]] || [[word:dhasodoj|dhasodoj]] || [[word:dhasodosh|dhasodosh]] || [[word:dhasodo|dhasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasodothol|dhasodothol]] || [[word:dhasodojol|dhasodojol]] || [[word:dhasodoshol|dhasodoshol]] || [[word:dhasodokol|dhasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasodothotho|dhasodothotho]] || [[word:dhasodojojo|dhasodojojo]] || [[word:dhasodoshosho|dhasodoshosho]] || [[word:dhasodoko|dhasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasodothon|dhasodothon]] || [[word:dhasodojon|dhasodojon]] || [[word:dhasodoshon|dhasodoshon]] || [[word:dhasodokon|dhasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasodothoro|dhasodothoro]] || [[word:dhasodojoro|dhasodojoro]] || [[word:dhasodoshoro|dhasodoshoro]] || [[word:dhasodokoro|dhasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
